title: LayeredDataAssetsPublishedSnapshot
description: Offline published L1 pointer (LDA-E2-04); not an L1 Hive manifest.

published_snapshot_id.description: Stable id for this publish event, e.g. pub_2026-05-03_abc12

source_snapshot_id.description: L1 batch / L0 snap id this publish points at

previous_published_snapshot_id.description: Prior pub id for rollback audit

l1_relative_root.description: Path relative to data root, e.g. l1_layered/snap_abcdef
